About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) is responsible for conducting the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET). The commission aims to provide quality education to students in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

The UPESSC is committed to selecting eligible candidates for teaching positions in government schools.

About the Programme

The UPESSC UPTET 2026 Answer Key is released for candidates who have appeared for the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026. The answer key provides candidates with the correct answers to the questions asked in the exam.

The UPTET is conducted to select eligible candidates for teaching positions in government schools in Uttar Pradesh.
